message:
fix: reap idle polecat sessions to prevent API slot burn

Add reapIdlePolecats() to daemon heartbeat cycle that auto-kills polecat
tmux sessions idle longer than the configured threshold (default 15m).
Handles edge case where persistentPreRun resets heartbeat to "working"
during gt done by cross-checking bead hook state.

Closes #2478

Co-Authored-By: Keagan van Zyl <keaganvanzyl@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
